name: Swedish Spirits/Pressed Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the beaten egg and vanilla, mixing well.
3. Gradually add the all-purpose flour and baking powder, stirring until combined.
4. Using a cookie press, form the dough into various shapes on ungreased baking sheets.
5. If using a cookie press is not possible, spoon small amounts of dough onto the prepared baking sheets.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8-10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool before decorating with candied fruits, colored sugar, or decorative icing if desired.
